name: Greet by name
description: Cross-platform starter script. Opens your OS's default text editor (TextEdit on Mac, Notepad on Windows), forces a new blank document, and types a greeting.

actions.label: dismiss any Open / file-picker panel that came up first
force a new blank document (Cmd+N on Mac, Ctrl+N on Windows)
let the new doc window appear

actions.text: Hello {{name}} — this was written by WillettBot.
